_metadata.source_book: Rolemaster (RMSS / C&T / RMC1 / R&CU / Shadow World)

herbs.effect_en: Universal antidote. If more than four ounces are taken in one day, one RR per ounce vs. lvl 20 or lose 1-10 pts of temporary CO & ST, with one pt of potential lost for every tenth pt
Antidote for Muscle poison
Nerve poison antidote. Made from Deadly Nightshade.
Slows for "Morgurth" by 50-80% (no RR), and antidote for reduction poisons
Antidote for Reduction poisons. Reverses "Ugliness of Orn", Channeling Curses, lvl 15 (no RR)
Universal antidote. Cures "Morgurth" (no RR), and antidote for all poisons
Antidote for Circulatory poisons
Antidote for Respiratory poisons
Universal antidote.
Emetic. Induces vomiting within 20 minutes. Limits severity of poison to degree at which vomiting occurs (for ingested poisons only).
Antidote for Conversion poisons
Antidote for Nerve poisons
Antidote for Nur-oilosse
Antidote for any poison. Must be taken within one day of poisoning.
Antidote for Nerve venom
Antidote for "Karfar" (#902, no RR required) and as antidote for other circulatory poisons
Antidote for "Asgurash" (#931, no RR required) and as antidote for other nerve poisons
Doubles rate of healing for fractures
Shatter repairs
Shatter repairs
Mends bone
Mends bone
Heals 4 sq. ft of burns (any)
Doubles healing rate for burns & minor cuts. Heals 5 hits if they result from burns.
Heals 10 sq. ft of burns (any)
Heals 1st & 2nd Degree burns, irritation from plants like nettle, pangwood and thistle in 1 round
Cures frostbite. Heals 2-20 hits resulting from cold.
Heals 1st & 2nd Degree burns, 1-10 hits resulting from heat.
Cures frostbite. Heals 1-50 hits resulting from cold.
Clam excretion. Heals 1st & 2nd Degree burns in 1-10 seconds, 3rd Degree burns in 1 day.
Stops bleeding by clotting and sealing wound. Takes 3 rounds to take effect. Patient cannot move (appreciably) without wound reopening.
Heals up to 10 hits of bleeding per round. Also, repels Vampires in a 10 ft radius for 5 hrs. (Trees repel in 20 ft radius, constantly)
Immediately stops all bleeding and heals all concussion hits
Stops any bleeding. Takes 1-10 rounds to take effect. Patient cannot move (appreciably) without wound reopening.
Immediately stops any form of bleeding.
Immediately stops any form of bleeding.
Stops any form of bleeding in 1 round
Usually brewed as tea or used in soup. Stops any form of bleeding in 1 round. User at -25 due to drowsiness, and likely to fall asleep
Stops any form of bleeding 1 round
Heals 2-12
Heals 1-10
Heals 4-9, wild heals 1-6
Powder mixed in water heals 1-20 instantly. If consumed more than once per week, -20 to actions for 2 days due to stomach cramps (no RR)
Heals all hits over a 1 hour period (proportionally)
Heals 1-6
Heals 1-10 for each of 2 consecutive rounds
Heals 10, instant effect
Heals 1-6
Heals 30. Wood has +5 enchantment value, AF 4.
Heals 100
Heals 30. Wood from tree has +5 enchantment value, AF 4
Heals 10, instant effect
Heals 50
Heals 2-20
Heals 10-100.. Wood from tree has enchantment value of +15, AF 1
Heals 1-4, brew keeps 1-2 weeks
Heals 3-300
Heals 5-50
+20 to Seduction maneuvers for 12 hrs (sweetens breath)
Doubles rate of healing for major wounds. Heals 2-12 hits.
Decongestant. +20 to RR vs. common cold. Speeds recovery from respiratory illness by 5x.
Capable of curing anything while patient is still alive, but healing only as effective as the healer (lvl for lvl). Full effect only in the hands of an "ordained" king. Will not keep or give life.
Cures fever. Reduction poison if ingested.
Reduces nausea
Heals 2-8, relieves pain and swelling, may reduce injury penalties at GM discretion. Maximum daily dosage is 10 (no effect beyond this).
Triples Exhaustion points, adds +20 to CO bonus for 12 hrs.
Tea cures hangovers in 1 hr. Oil heals minor cuts (up to 3 hits) and rashes from poison oak or ivy.
+20 to vision based perception rolls, +10 to missile attacks
Repels any insect. Smells noticeably foul within 50 ft
Repels evil Essence spell users (& hybrids) within 20 ft for 3-30 rnds
Oil gives +20 to RRs vs. Lung Diseases. Antidote for Respiratory poisons. Powder gives +50 to Fertility.
Smoke like tobacco. Mental summons of one "friend" (beast or folk), range 300 ft x user's level. Coma relief.
Oil is universal antidote. Burning stems gives +20 to meditation maneuvers.
Tea is a sleep potion. Poultice doubles healing rate of sprains, muscle damage and burns.
+25 ST bonus for 48 hrs
Smoke like tobacco. Mental summons of one "friend" (beast or folk), range 20 miles.
Essence of Germander oil is applied beneath the nostrils before sleeping. Sleeping on a bed of these plants renders 1 hr of sleep equivalent to 3. Also heals 10 hits.
Consumed 3x per week, slows aging such that 2wks = 1 day, +55 RR vs. disease and infections
Assures safe childbirth, provides nutritional balance.

+20 to all RR and DB for 10 hrs. After effect wears off, must make RR or will  fight anything perceived as a threat for another 10 hrs. Addiction increases this time limit to (level of addiction +1)x 10 hrs.
Brew from clam removes hair for several days.
In d10 rnds, anyone taking receives +20 to effects of First/Second Aid, Surgery, Animal Healing or similar treatment
+10 to disease resistance, cures common cold, heals 1-2 hits
Decongestant.
Anesthetic (1 rnd)
Reduces fever.
Endurance costs for 1 day are halved
Anticoagulant. Antidote for blood clotting poisons. Treats heart disease and related illness. Improper use will cause patient to bleed to death.
Reduces inflammation, cures topical infections
Protects the skin from sunburn, aids tanning
+10 disease resistance for 1-10 days
One day's nutrition
Lifekeeping (1 day)
Lifekeeping (1 day)
Lifegiving for Elves if given within 28 days of death. Laurelin wood has +20 enchanted value, AF 2.
Lifekeeping (1 day). Kills one day later unless Sorul nut (#607) is ingested.
Lifegiving for Elves if given within 7 days of death. Also known as Ololosse
Lifekeeping (2-20 days)
Lifekeeping (1 hr)
Lifegiving, if given within 56 days
Lifegiving, if given within 30 days
2x duration of all "Movement" category Spells cast within two hours of drinking the tea
Doubles range spell user may use familiar's senses, familiar receives benefit of all healing performed on spell user while under effects. Last 1 day.

Mixed with Eldaana (#601) and Breldiar (#713), restores spell casting abilities (lost thru fumbles, curses, etc). Mixed with Klytun (#903), reduces coma length by 1/2 (healing comas run full course in 1/2 time). Otherwise, nerve poison at level indicated.
Blood of Lavaenus victim. +500 PP, knowledge of all spells on known lists. Death follows 1 hr later, with immediate soul departure (no rnds of delay)
Chewing the thorn gives +25 to spell casting static maneuvers for d10 minutes
Loss of all spell casting abilities until once per day RR against herb level (use Magic stat mod) is achieved.

Tranquilizer. Gives relaxed, tranquil state, +30 to all spell casting, meditations and academic skills, immunity to fear effects, +20 to all RRs against disease, stops spread of any poison and reverses non-permanent damage in 1-10 days. Lovely aroma. Flowers have same effect as brew.

Gives permanent Nightvision, add 1 pt to Primary magic stat, Archetype (x2 PPs, +1 to multipliers), Scope (targets) - +1 target, Temporal - 2x duration, Spatial (self =touch, touch = 5, all others +50 to range) and Scope (2x area of effect). Chance of death is 100%, minus level and (average) magic stat bonus x3
PP multiplier of Magic stat bonus x 3/10. Lasts one day (until sleeping)
Bathing in oil triples healing rate for sprains, torn ligaments and cartilage damage.
Doubles healing rate for sprains, torn ligaments and cartilage damage.
Mends muscle damage
Mends muscle damage
Heals cartilage damage
Repairs sprains
Heals cartilage damage
Repairs sprains
Nerve repairs
Anti-spasmodic. Treats epilepsy.
Cures all forms of paralysis which do not require nerve regeneration, as "Paralysis Cures", Nerve Law, Closed Channeling
Doubles healing rate for nerve damage
Nerve repairs

Rejoins severed limbs as all the appropriate "Joining True", Closed Channeling lists (1 does required for each appropriate spell required, never to exceed four). If more than four doses are taken, RR must be made against circulatory poison.
Restores sight
Preservation of organic material (up to body size) for 1 day
Restores hearing
Topical salve repairs damaged organs in 1-10 days, times racial recovery multiplier.
Restores hearing
Poultice applied will completely regenerate severed limbs in 6 months (times racial recovery multiplier)
Regenerates one major organ in 5 mins. Afterwards, at 0 hits due to drain on body.
Preserves organic material
Restoration of one organ or area. Side effect: skin disease (AP loss of 1-10) and 6 hits per round when skin is exposed to full sunlight.
Preservation of any organic material (up to body size) for 1 hour
Repairs organ damage. Nausea for 1-10 hrs (-50)
Smoking leaves cures all blindness not requiring regeneration.
Smoking leaves cures all non-genetic blindness (including regeneration)
Repairs organ damage.
Breathe with low oxygen (25%+), 12 hrs. Using herb more than once every other day is lethal (no RR)
Restores as good sleep. Use in given week results in: once = 1 pt loss of temp CO, twice = 5 pt loss, thrice = 25 pt loss
Protects eyes in intense light or glare. Allows sight despite sudden or blinding light. Lasts 9 hrs.
Subtracts 30 from maneuver and melee. Adds 50 to spells and missile attacks. Euphoria. Lasts 1 hr.
Enhanced vision (triple range, +25 perception) plus mild infravision (50 ft) for 3 hrs. Using this herb more than once a day is lethal (no RR)
Heals d10 hits immediately, followed by 3d10 rounds of regeneration at 1 hit per round
Heart stimulant. Doubles speed for 1 hr. Using this herb more than once per hr is lethal (no RR)
Fish eyes. +5 to ST bonus and 250% weight allowance for 6 hrs.
125% Movement Rate and +25 Movement Maneuvers for d10 hours
Breathe under water (only) for 4 hrs
Intoxication and dreams (actions at -50) for 2 hrs. Acts as 1 days nutrition.
+20 to Awareness maneuvers for Animals
Double recovery rate of hits and exhaustion pts while asleep
Allows mental summons of one known sentient friend (up to 1/2 mile away)
Increases strength for d10 rounds. +10 Strength bonus, double concussion damage delivered.
Protects vs. natural flame and heat for 1-10 hours.
Triples duration of Adrenal Moves for 1 hr (more if racial recovery multiplier of less than 1)
Nightvision (100 ft for 6 hrs)
Superior Taste, nutrition (+15 to Cooking maneuvers if used, provides all nutritional needs for 1 week)
Darkvision (30 ft for 6 hrs)
Increases visual perception (double range, +25 perception) for 10 minutes. Wood has +10 enchantment, AF 3.
Allows free (70%) action underwater, allows imbiber to breathe air or water, and regenerate 1 hit every 2 rnds in water. Lasts for 1 hr.
Removes up to -75 in Sunlight penalties for underground races. Lasts for 1 day.
Bonus of +20 when casting spells. Lasts 1 hr. Maneuver and melee bonus -20. 10% chance any targeted spell will be cast on nearest target.
For "good in heart", instills confidence and singleness of purpose (+25 all actions) for 1-4 hrs
Smoke from burning scales make animals ravenously hungry. After blood is drawn, they go into a rage (-25 riding maneuvers, but +10 OB and 2x concussion damage). Effect lasts 2 hrs.
Exposure for 24 hrs allows immediate stat gain roll, reduces age by d10 years, plus +10 to all magical skills (Lore: magical, Power Manipulation, Power Pt Development, Power Awareness)
Acute smell and taste (+50 perceptions) for 1 hr
Haste (3 rnds, beginning rnd following ingestion)
Enhances smell and hearing (triple range, +50 perceptions) for 1 hr
Doubles racial stat bonuses for 6 months (imbiber reduced to 10% activity for 48 hrs thereafter due to physical exhaustion)
Restores any stat losses other than those due to age. Affects only one stat per use.
Daily use increases AP by 5. Interruption of use will not reverse addictive resistance, but results in loss of benefit. Withdrawal means loss of 15 from RE and ME.
Stun relief (3 rnds)
Stun relief (1 rnds)
Stun relief (1-10 rnds)
Stun relief (3 rnds)
Stun relief (2 rnds)
Heat sensitive vision (infravision 50 ft) for 1 hr. Tastes of raisins and carrots. Loaf keeps 1-2 months.
1 days nutrition per slice (equivalent of 3 meals)
Dwarven Waybread. 5 days nutrition per slice. Tastes of mushrooms and pepper. Loaf keeps 7 weeks.
Increased ST for 1 minute. +10 ST bonus, 2x concussion hits delivered. Tastes of wheat and onions. Loaf keeps 1 month.

Allows one to see with complete clarity (as on cloudless day) for 1 hr, regardless of weather, lighting or eye injuries (unless eye destroyed). Tastes of garlic, carrots and ginger. Loaf keeps 2-20 weeks.
Elven Waybread. 1 week's nutrition per slice. Tastes of mushrooms and pepper. Loaf keeps indefinitely
Restores nervous system to normal in 1-10 rounds. Tastes of pumpkin and lemon. Loaf keeps 2 months.
Provides one day's nutrition. Tastes of cheese and spinach.
Adds 50 to Adrenal Maneuvers for 3 rnds
Causes sleep and quick unconsciousness. 1 hrs sleep = 4
Allows perception of Essence flows and enchantments (+50 Power perception) for 1 hr. Eyes glow red.
Hallucinogen. (-50 perception, -30 maneuver and melee)
Euphoric. Allows for shared dreams with family member who is also sleeping.
Hallucinogen. Induces trance state (-90 perception, -60 maneuver and melee) for 2-3 hrs. Sometimes results in prophetic visions.
Leaf produces smoke which affects 20 ft radius. Relaxes for 1-10 rounds (-75 to all actions)
Euphoric hallucinogen. +10 to user's AP for 2 hrs, afterwards weak 1-10 hrs (-50 all actions).
Hallucinogen. Cures mind loss and mental diseases, but prevents all movement for 1-10 weeks.
Causes sleep and quick unconsciousness. 1 hrs sleep = 6
Hallucinogen. Infravision for 1 hr (300 ft)
Smoke from leaf is mild depressant (-20 from maneuver and melee) for 2 hrs.
Blood is strong stimulant. Hasted for 10-20 rounds. 20% chance of heart attack (reduced CO, EN and increased danger of subsequent attacks)
Euphoria for 1 hr (-50 all actions). Gives 1 day's nutrition.

Hallucinogen. Immediate 15 min coma, then awaken with 2x PP restored. Extra PPs lost after next sleeping period. 2% cumulative chance per use that visions are so frightening that user becomes suicidal.
Hallucinogen. See invisible beings for 10 minutes.
All sensations of pain become intense pleasure, imbiber able to withstand 4x hits while effect lasts. Effect lasts 1-4 hrs.
Relaxant (-30 all actions). User takes double concussion hits before passing out. Lasts 1-2 hrs.
Invisible smoke relaxes (-75 all actions) for 1-10 rounds)
Euphoric. Allows for shared dreams with friend similarly affected.
Addiction checks should be made only upon reaching "drunken state" (i.e.: drinking in moderation does not cause addiction). Certain kinds of alcohol have a higher (or lower) AF
+20 to RRs vs. blood diseases, +10 to RRs vs. Circulatory poisons per week

Attack level is ounces imbibed. RR failure by <25 = good, strong intoxicant effect; 26-50 = uplifted spirits and +5EM, -5 SD (loss of control); 51-100 = +10 EM, -10 SD, possible revelation of secrets; 101+ = mania (alternately laughing, crying, etc), finally passing out for 1-12 hrs.
Addiction checks should be made only upon reaching "drunken state" (i.e.: drinking in moderation does not cause addiction). Certain kinds of alcohol have a higher (or lower) AF
Addiction checks should be made only upon reaching "drunken state" (i.e.: drinking in moderation does not cause addiction). Certain kinds of alcohol have a higher (or lower) AF
Shira Beer. Maximum of Moderate effects - Susceptible to suggestion (-10 SD). Minimum effect - Drowsiness (-20 to actions)
Shira Brandy. Maximum of Moderate effects - Complete immobilization and suggestive trance. Minimum effect - Severe drowsiness (-100 to actions)
Elven brandy. Renews endurance up to three times daily, adds +30 to RRs vs. mental attacks & fatigue.
Addiction checks should be made only upon inhaling more than 3 ounces of tobacco. Certain kinds of tobacco have a higher (or lower) AF
Assists stat gain (can use high die used for stat gain rolls, and applies to both dice)
+20 Mnemonics during smoking and for one hr thereafter
+10 vs. Fear for 1 day, excellent smoke rings
+25 to Self Control skills if in calm state within two hours of smoking
Relaxant (-75 all actions) for 1-10 rounds
Adds 50 to Spell Failure avoidance rolls for overcasting. Lasts 5 rounds.
Maximum of Severe effects. Severe effect reduces temp. CO by 5-50, with 1 pt of potential CO lost for every 10th pt of temp. CO lost. Raw venom (from snakebite) is lvl 5
Extraordinarily painful death as blood vessels rot away in 2 hrs if in bloodstream, 6 hrs if ingested.
Reddish juice causes massive blood clotting
Maximum of Moderate effects. RR failure by 25 results in Amnesia for d10+10 days, 26-50 for 2d10+20 days, 51-100 for 5d10+50 days, 100+ for 15d10+150 days
Extreme Effect - Slow death by destruction of circulatory system, beginning at pt of entry.
Maximum of Severe Effect - Severe hemophilia
Black powder gives 10-100 hits at minimum. Maximum of Moderate general effects
Reddish paste causes heart malfunction. Effects begin in 2-12 rnds
Golden paste causes 1-10 day coma. Effects begin after general effects have begun.
Brown paste gives 1-10 hits at minimum. Maximum of Moderate general effects
Brown liquid slows blood flow and victim needs double usual sleep until fully recovered. Maximum of Moderate general effects.
"Perfect" poison, encompasses all poison types (i.e. 6 RRs). Odorless, colorless and tasteless, RR's required for circulatory, respiratory, nerve, muscle, conversion and reduction poisons.
Blue juice causes body temperature to rise. Severe effects result in spontaneous combustion. Phosphorescent green firefly juice.
Black venom causes hardening of tendons in 1-4 appendages. Severe affects make appendages useless.
Yellow venom acts on victims eyes. Severe effect converts optic juices to honey.
Inhalation of pollen. Maximum of extreme effect. Slow, euphoric death over 1-12 hrs. Blood turns to likrysium.
Green venom acts on appendages. Severe effect turns 1-4 appendages to stone.
Orange tree sap affects mucous membranes. Severe effects turn mucous to acid (blinds, or destroys windpipe and/or esophagus)
Clear red fluid. Extreme effect causes brain to liquefy in skull, causing death in 6-12 rnds. Does not affect Ishru. Made from same plant as Pleasurethorn
Brownish powder sterilizes and gives 5-50 hits at minimum. Maximum of Moderate general effects.
Maximum of Moderate effects - Gives Darkvision, but victim has extreme light sensitivity: is at -50 to all actions in bright light, -75 in direct sunlight
Both muscle and nerve poison (requires 2 RRs). Extreme effect is death in 1-2 rnds.
Extreme effect of death in 1-10 hrs. Even successful RR results in -40 to actions for 1-6 days. Often misdiagnosed as food poisoning.
Extreme effect: Heart stops in 1-7 rnds
Maximum of Moderate effects. Feels soothing when applied to muscles, but renders appendage applied to useless for 1-2 hrs. Must be applied topically.
Tan paste affects hearing and gives 1-10 hits at minimum. Maximum of Severe general effects (destroys hearing permanently)
Both muscle and nerve poison (requires 2 RRs). Extreme effect is death in 1-2 rnds. Prepared from Foxglove.
Maximum of Severe effects - causes loss of coordination and dexterity: loss of 5-50 temporary AG & QU, with one pt of potential lost for every tenth pt of temporary lost
Affects 1-4 appendages. Maximum of Severe general effects (loss of 1-100 in Temporary AG)
Acts in 1-10 rnds. Mild effect is blindness in 1-2 eyes. Moderate effect is complete blindness and coma. Severe effect is death.
Black paste affects nervous system. Extreme effect destroys nervous system and kills instantly.
Extreme effect - destroys nervous system and kills in 5 rounds. Minimum effect - paralysis for 1-100 rounds
Maximum of Moderate effects. Truth serum. Burned as incense, causes victim to freely disclose secrets (1-10 hours). At a minimum, disorients (-10 all actions for 1-10 hours)
Brownish red snake venom. Maximum of Moderate effects (upper body paralysis)
Extreme Effect - death. Severe effect - destroys nervous system in affected limb. Minimum effect - partial paralysis (-50 to all actions)
Extreme effect is death in 1-2 days. Made from Deadly Nightshade.
White powder instantly causes mild euphoria (victim at -50 for 1-10 rnds). Extreme effect is brain destroyed after 1-10 mins.

White powder instantly causes euphoria (victim at -75 for 1-10 hrs). Extreme effect is permanent, complete loss of all mental stats (potential and temporary) - unlike Cathaana, does no damage to nervous tissue
Powder placed under the tongue induces horrific trance, during which they will answer questions truthfully. Made from Deadly Nightshade.
Maximum of Moderate effects - total amnesia for 1-100 days. At a minimum, disorients (-30 all actions for 1-10 hours)
Extreme effect causes victim to run until they die of exhaustion (as "Running Curse", Curses, Evil Channeling). Minimum effect is severe hallucinations for 1-10 days.
Extreme effect - death in 6-10 rnds. Minimum effect - complete incapacity (-100) for 1-10 hours.
Extreme effect - death in 6-10 rnds. Minimum effect - complete incapacity (-100) for 1-10 hours.
Maximum of Moderate effects - Deep sleep for 11-20 hrs.
Maximum of Severe Effects - Blindness, (with Extreme effect only for arthropods and invertebrates) Minimum effect - -30 to visual perception.
Refined Iguri viper blood. Maximum of Severe Effect - causes feeblemindedness (-50 all actions, permanently). Minimum effect - -50 all actions for 10-100 hrs. Normal Iguri venom is lvl 5
Maximum of severe effect (insanity in 1-100 weeks)

Maximum of Severe effects - Causes nervous breakdowns (RR required at -50 to all situations using SD, failure results in -100 to all actions). Minimum effect - -25 to activities due to depression. Variable recovery periods.
Maximum of Moderate effects. Lose all concept of language for 10 hrs. Cannot speak or understand speech.
Maximum of Moderate effects. Complete amnesia for 1 yr. Eyes turn green.
Maximum of Moderate effects - Complete paralysis 4 days. Minimum effect - fever and delirium (4 days)
Maximum of Moderate effects. Coma lasts a minimum of 1 month. Roll d100 each month, with roll of 95+ required to awaken.
Lizard venom. Maximum of Moderate effects (Insanity - victim capable of only random actions for 1-4 hrs)
Glimsinu venom. Extreme Effect: Paralysis and death in 1-5 rnds
Maximum of severe effect- Coma 1-4 days. Minimum effect - Loss of will (10-100 from WILL). As minimum effect is often desired, users often cut dosage level.
Extreme effect - death (1-4 days). Severe effect - Paralysis (1-10 hours). Minimum effect - numbs limbs (-40 to all actions for 1-10 hrs)
Brownish cave drake saliva. Maximum of severe effects (erosion of nervous system in 1-20 rnds - victim left at  -50 to -100 activity)
Severe effect - All actions at -50
Hultif beetle venom. Maximum of Severe Effect - Insanity. Minimum effect - Distraction (-10 to actions) for 1-100 hours.
Acts in 1-2 rnds. Maximum of moderate effects (victim loses feeling in 1-6 extremities [head, genitals, hands, feet] for 1-100 days)
Maximum of Severe Effects - permanent paralysis.
Pink volcanic gas. Maximum of Moderate effects - sleep (1-3 hrs)
Extreme effects result in destruction of nervous system (paralyzed instantly, dead in 1-10 minutes)
In concentrated form is level 10 by contact and level 60 in bloodstream. Raw form is level 3/15. Extreme effect is instant death. Minimum effect is coma for 1-10 days.
Great spider venom. Severe effect causes permanent paralysis. Minimum effect is fever and delirium for 10-100 hrs.
Acts in 1-100 rounds. Mild effect is deep sleep. Moderate effect in degeneration of balance and hearing (-1-100 to AG and -50 to Perceptions). Severe effect is total paralysis (maximum effect)
Severe effect causes mild coma (1-10 days) and loss of 2-20 from ME. Minimum effect is dizziness for 1-10 days (-25 all actions)
Gemsting venom. Extreme Effect: Convulsions for 1-6 rounds, followed by death
Causes ulceration of mucous membranes. Minimum effect is 5-50 hits.
Grey/black blood affects exposed areas. Maximum of severe effects (dissolves affected area in 1-10 rnds). Affects metals and organic materials. Does not affect glass, sand or pottery.
Rark bat venom. Extreme effect is death as bones dissolve. Attack level of 1 in raw form.

Distilled Drake blood and venom is both reduction and nerve poison (therefore requiring two antidotes, or Durad or Laurre, which are specific anti-toxin/antidotes). Dissolves brain. Minimum effect - Coma for 1-100 years. Must be kept out of sunlight in a glass or ceramic container (dissolves everything else).
Milky white juices affect organs. Maximum of severe effects (liquefies one organ in 1-10 mins)
Blue/grey paste causes dehydration. Extreme effect is fatal in 1-10 mins
Maximum of Moderate effect - causes warts and scars. Minimum effect is 1-10 hits.
Topical contact burns. Himros is specific antidote.
Maximum of Moderate effect - loss of all teeth.
Uster hawk saliva. Causes cartilage to dissolve.
Silver powder scars skin, gives 2-20 hits at minimum. Maximum of moderate effects.
Extreme effect is slow (1 day) paralysis and death
Surn catfish venom. Maximum of Severe effects - toe and fingers rot (-25 all actions). Minimum effect - loss of sensitivity (-10 to all actions involving sense f touch for 1-10 days)
Wy catfish venom. Maximum of Moderate effects - complete hair loss.
Oil from glands of Thorf panther. Maximum of Moderate effects - loss of colorvision.
Great spider venom. Extreme effect is complete dissolution of organs in 1-10 minutes. Minimum effect is fever and delirium (10-100 hrs)
Larn hornet venom.
Bluish extract. Gives 1-10 hits at minimum. Maximum of severe effects (blinds by reducing optic nerve to water).
Only affects Trolls. Maximum of Mild effects. Causes sneezing/coughing fits for 10 minutes. Aromatic candles made from Bayberry have the same effect.
Bukandas wolf scent gland extract. Maximum of Severe Effect - permanent severe asthma (-25 Exhaustion pts), minimum effect - mild, temporary asthma (-10 Exhaustion pts)
Death in 3-30 minutes.. Made from Flax.
Green powder. Maximum of severe effects (Elves subject to Extreme effects)
Mist/vapor from tree acts as depressant causing immediate and continuing sleep. There are no other effects.
Brown paste gives 1-100 hits at minimum. Maximum of mild effects.
Yellow venom gives 5-50 hits at minimum. Maximum of mild effects.
Extreme effect causes death in 10-100 rnds.
Tan paste. Extreme effect destroys lungs and kills in 1-100 rnds
Brown juice gives 3-300 hits at minimum. Maximum of mild effects.
Extreme effect is death in 1-3 days.

Minimum effect (RR succeeds by 0-20) - Irritability for 1-6 rnds. Otherwise, homicidal/berserk rage (attack with intent to kill). RR failure of 1-25 = 30-60 minutes, 26-50 = 1 to 2 hrs, 51-100 = 2-6 hrs, 101+ = 6-12 hrs. Victim suffers amnesia of all actions following effect.
Creamy paste gives 3-30 hits at minimum. Maximum of mild effects.
Pinkish paste gives 1-100 hits at minimum. Maximum of mild effects.
